name: The Boy Who Cried Wolf
title: The Boy Who Cried Wolf
description: An animated retelling of the classic Aesop's fable about the importance of honesty and the consequences of lying
author: ERB Team

scenes.title: The End
scenes.summary: Thank you for watching "The Boy Who Cried Wolf"
lessons: A liar will not be believed, even when telling the truth
Trust, once broken, is hard to rebuild
Honesty is the foundation of all relationships
Think before you act - your actions have consequences
